3215830.name: Coven: All Powerful Demo
3215830.description:
Demo Details

This demo includes the first 6 playable characters, 6 maps, 40 enchantment cards, 3 Game Modes, and leaderboards. Players can play a substantial slice of the full game through this demo, with more varied progression mechanics, new characters, new maps, and new enchantments being available in the full game.

Welcome to the Coven

Choose your path among powerful Sages, each sworn to a unique Coven Allegiance. Master an arsenal of spectacular spells across three disciplines:

  • Offensive magics to devastate your foes

  • Defensive enchantments to protect your allies

  • Support incantations to turn the tide of battle




Dynamic Team Combat

Rally your fellow spellcasters in intense 3v3, 1v1, and 8-player Free-For-All battles across whimsical, ever-changing Realms. Work together to claim powerful Relics while outmaneuvering rival teams through tactical spell combinations and coordinated assaults. Victory demands both individual skill and seamless team coordination.

Strategic Depth

  • Diverse roster of Sages, each with unique spell loadouts and playstyles

  • Complex interplay between different Coven Allegiances

  • Multiple viable team compositions and strategies

Fast-Paced Action

  • Quick, action-packed matches are perfect for both casual and competitive play

  • Fluid spell-casting system that rewards skill and timing

  • Dynamic objectives that keep every match fresh and exciting

Magical Progression

  • Tackle Realm Challenges to gain XP and strengthen your Sage's abilities

  • Exit Victorious in Realm Battles to unlock the full power of your Sage

  • Climb the competitive ranks and prove your magical prowess

The Battlefield Awaits

Jump into matches solo or gather your friends to form the ultimate magical strike team. With easy-to-learn but difficult-to-master gameplay, Coven: All Powerful offers an enchanting competitive experience that will keep you coming back for "just one more match."

Whether you're a seasoned spellslinger or new to the Realms, there's a place for you in the Coven. Choose your Sage, master your spells, and prepare for magical mayhem!
